description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with two adjacent rectangular volumes, each topped with a flat, overhanging roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, contrasted by dark window frames and roof edges. Large, grid-patterned windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the house is landscaped with tall, conical shrubs and a paved entry path, while the side includes a private patio area bordered by planters and additional greenery. The overall aesthetic is clean and minimalist, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces. The house appears to be designed for urban or suburban neighborhoods, offering both privacy and curb appeal.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large grid windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring tall shrubs and a private patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, upper windows, and a patio area with tall shrubs and a privacy fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back walls, flat roofs, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more visible windows and the patio area bordered by greenery.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaped path with tall shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a paved path, flanked by tall shrubs and minimal decorative elements.
